top_heading: 1 INDICATIONS AND USAGE > 1.6 Maintenance of Healing of EE Due to Acid-Mediated GERD
top_preview: Omeprazole delayed-release capsules are indicated for the maintenance healing of EE due to acid-mediated GERD in patients 2 years of age and older. Controlled studies do not extend beyond 12 months.
